Title: Level of Each Node
Description:
Given a connected undirected graph, print the BFS level (distance from node 1) of each node from 1 to N, one per line.

First line: N and E. Next E lines: edge u v.

**Constraints:**
- 1 <= N <= 100,000, 0 <= E <= 300,000, graph is connected
- Expected complexity: O(N + E)
